apps.name: Apps
apps.description: Shipping apps you can actually use.

dev-tools.name: Developer Tools
dev-tools.description: Tools for devs, writers, and tinkerers.

education.name: Education
education.description: Tools built for teachers and classrooms.

snipboard.name: Snipboard
snipboard.tagline: Lightweight Windows screenshot tool with smart clipboard templates.
snipboard.description: A minimal Windows screenshot utility that lives in the system tray. Global hotkeys for region and fullscreen capture. Smart clipboard templates (Markdown, HTML, relative paths, and custom formats) so your snips drop into docs, chats, and issues already formatted. Persistent history panel, multi-snip mode, dark theme, and an offline-first lifetime license.
highlights: Global hotkeys for region + fullscreen capture
Smart clipboard templates (Markdown, HTML, custom)
Persistent history panel + multi-snip mode
Offline-first with a lifetime license

picklepairs.name: PicklePairs
picklepairs.tagline: Pickleball tournament manager — pair players, run rounds, track stats.
picklepairs.description: A full tournament management web app built for pickleball clubs and casual groups. Plan rounds with smart pairing, run matches with a big-touch score keypad, track leaderboards and player stats, keep match history, and export results. Designed mobile-first so it works courtside on a phone. Free to use at picklepairs.com.
highlights: Smart pairing that avoids repeat partners
Big-touch score keypad designed for courtside use
Leaderboards, player stats, and match history
Mobile-first — works on any phone

reviews.quote: I just discovered this website and I love it. You've made it easy to use. Being able to drop players in between rounds or change who sits out are extremely helpful tools.
reviews.author: PicklePairs user

reviews.quote: Using PicklePairs was a great experience. Definitely makes everything easy to use, and everyone commented on how smoothly the tournament ran. I'd like to stick with this one due to its ability to pair partners without repeats each round.
reviews.author: Tournament organizer

claude-harry-ui.name: Claude Harry's UI
claude-harry-ui.tagline: Electron desktop wrapper that gives Claude Code a proper UI.
claude-harry-ui.description: A Windows desktop app built on Electron that wraps the Claude Code CLI in a real GUI. Terminal integration, syntax highlighting, and markdown rendering so sessions feel like a native editor instead of a raw shell. Built for people who want Claude's agentic coding loop without living in a terminal window.

skeptics-guide-player.name: Skeptics Guide Player
skeptics-guide-player.tagline: PWA podcast player for The Skeptics Guide to the Universe.
skeptics-guide-player.description: A standalone Progressive Web App for listening to The Skeptics Guide to the Universe. Browse, search, and play episodes with playlist support, dark space-themed UI, and install-to-home-screen on mobile or desktop. Works offline once episodes are cached.

transcribe-tutorials.name: TranscribeTutorials
transcribe-tutorials.tagline: AI video transcription with automatic chapter indexing.
transcribe-tutorials.description: Upload a video or drop in a URL and get an accurate transcript back via AssemblyAI, with automatic chapter markers detected from the audio. Edit chapters by hand, then export searchable, embeddable HTML with clickable timestamp links — purpose-built for turning tutorial videos into indexed reference libraries.

pokemon-card-tracker.name: Thai Pokemon Card Tracker
pokemon-card-tracker.tagline: Track, scan, and manage your Pokemon card collection across languages.
pokemon-card-tracker.description: A full-stack web app for managing Pokemon card collections with multilingual support. Browse thousands of cards across sets, scan cards with your camera, track your collection progress, view stats, and explore Pokemon names across 9 languages. Features three view modes (grid, carousel, table), smart filtering, and a polished Material UI design.
highlights: Browse cards in grid, carousel, or table view
Camera-based card scanning
Pokemon names across 9 languages
Collection tracking with stats dashboard

nas-installer-helper.name: NAS Installer Helper
nas-installer-helper.tagline: Let Windows installers write to mapped NAS drives without "invalid drive" crashes.
nas-installer-helper.description: A PowerShell utility that fixes a specific but maddening Windows problem: game and app installers crash with 'invalid drive' errors when pointed at a mapped NAS share, even though the drive works fine in Explorer. The cause is that installers run as SYSTEM, which does not see user-session drive mappings. This tool temporarily grants SYSTEM visibility to your NAS share so the installer can complete, then cleanly revokes access afterward. No dependencies, no compilation, no saved credentials — just two scripts you run with admin rights.

portfolio-site.name: Portfolio Site
portfolio-site.tagline: Terminal-themed portfolio with interactive CLI, search, and a Claude Code simulator.
portfolio-site.description: This site. A static portfolio built as an interactive terminal — browse projects by category, search with highlighted results, filter by hashtags, track WIP progress with granular bars, and run a simulated Claude Code session right in the browser. No framework, no build step — just vanilla HTML/CSS/JS served on GitHub Pages. Built entirely with AI-assisted engineering using Claude Code.
highlights: Interactive terminal with search, tags, and navigation
Simulated Claude Code session with /help, /cost, /exit
WIP progress bars with category breakdowns
Zero dependencies — pure static HTML/CSS/JS

twentyfour.name: TwentyFour
twentyfour.tagline: Real-time multiplayer math puzzle — combine four numbers to make 24.
twentyfour.description: A web-based Game of 24 with single-player and real-time multiplayer modes. Players combine four random numbers using basic operations to reach exactly 24, using an innovative segmented circle UI. Features Socket.IO-powered Team Mode for collaborative solving and Versus Mode for competitive play, with QR code session joining, difficulty levels, and server-side puzzle generation that guarantees every puzzle is solvable.
highlights: Segmented circle UI for intuitive number selection
Real-time multiplayer with Team and Versus modes
QR code + session code for instant mobile joining
Server-side solver guarantees every puzzle is solvable

team-maker.name: Team Maker
team-maker.tagline: Smart team generator with role preferences, pairing constraints, and drag-and-drop.
team-maker.description: A team randomizer built for classrooms and project-based learning. Students rank preferred roles, set do-not-pair and pair-with constraints, and the algorithm assigns balanced teams that respect every rule. Drag-and-drop editing, conflict warnings, pairing matrix view, and PNG export make it easy to adjust and share results. No signup required — runs entirely in the browser.
highlights: Preference-based role assignment with ranked choices
Do-not-pair and pair-with constraint engine
Drag-and-drop team editing with conflict warnings
PNG export and localStorage persistence

flashcard-maker.name: Deckuration
flashcard-maker.tagline: Flashcard creator with AI prompts, auto-images, and bulk generation for educators.
flashcard-maker.description: A flashcard creation platform for teachers who need professional cards fast. Paste AI-generated content or type your own, and each card automatically pulls a relevant image from Pixabay, Pexels, or Unsplash. Supports bulk generation from JSON/TXT files, full style customization, deck management, and export to PNG or print-ready layouts. Optional cloud sync with user accounts.
highlights: Auto-fetched images from multiple providers per card
AI prompt templates for bulk content generation
Multi-format import (JSON, TXT, real-time text)
PNG export, batch download, and print-ready layouts

report-repo.name: Report Repo
report-repo.tagline: All-in-one assessment tracker and report generator for educators.
report-repo.description: A full-stack assessment management platform that lets teachers create custom assessments, track student progress in real-time with a dynamic class tracker, and auto-generate personalized reports. Supports school-wide deployments with role-based access, bilingual UI (English and Thai), Google Drive integration, and export to PDF and Excel. Built to replace spreadsheets and give teachers their time back.
highlights: Custom assessment creator with rubrics and comment banks
Real-time class tracker with automatic progress calculation
Auto-generated student reports with PDF/Excel export
School-wide roles, sharing, and Google Drive sync

my-big-small-trip.name: My Big Small Trip
my-big-small-trip.tagline: Interactive map-based day trip planner with shareable itineraries.
my-big-small-trip.description: A full-stack trip planning app for building custom day itineraries on an interactive map. Browse curated locations across multiple regions (Kyoto, Tokyo, Hiroshima, Tampa Bay), create trips, add locations with transit details and costs, visualize routes, and share your plans via unique links with real-time sync. Includes favorites, route optimization, bulk location import, and trip statistics.
highlights: Interactive map with curated location pins and detail cards
Shareable trip links with real-time collaborative sync
Multi-region support with 26+ curated locations each
Trip templates, favorites, and route optimization

pc-remote.name: PC-Remote
pc-remote.tagline: Control your Windows PC from your phone — screen mirror, keyboard, files, and apps.
pc-remote.description: A remote desktop app that pairs a Python WebSocket server with a Flutter Android client. Mirror your screen in real-time with adaptive quality, control mouse and keyboard via touch gestures, browse and transfer files, and launch or close applications. QR code pairing with PIN authentication and mDNS auto-discovery make setup instant on your local network.
highlights: Real-time screen mirroring with adaptive quality presets
Touch trackpad, keyboard, and gesture-based mouse control
File browser with transfer, rename, delete, and create
QR code pairing with PIN auth and mDNS discovery

hfs-drive-viewer.name: HFS Drive Viewer
hfs-drive-viewer.tagline: Read and write Apple HFS+ drives on Windows with safety-first architecture.
hfs-drive-viewer.description: A Windows desktop app for accessing HFS+ filesystems — Apple's format that Windows can't natively read. Built with .NET 10 and WinUI 3, it implements a clean-room native C parser for HFS+ volumes, write-ahead logging for safe modifications, and an elevated helper process for privilege escalation. Safety checks prevent writes to boot drives or mounted system partitions. Currently supports full read operations with folder creation on physical drives.
highlights: Clean-room HFS+ parser built from Apple's TN1150 spec
Write-ahead logging with automatic transaction recovery
8-point safety checklist prevents destructive writes
Elevated helper via named pipes for privilege isolation

codemap.name: CodeMap
codemap.tagline: Drag-and-drop codebase visualizer with interactive force-directed graphs.
codemap.description: Drop a project folder and see its architecture as an interactive node-link graph. CodeMap parses source files across multiple languages, extracts dependency relationships (imports, component renders, function calls, CSS references), and renders an animated force-directed layout with D3. Features include a minimap, fuzzy search, file type filtering, and an insights panel with node statistics.
highlights: Force-directed graph visualization with D3 and SVG
Multi-language dependency extraction (JS, TS, Python, CSS)
Minimap navigator and fuzzy search with Fuse.js
Insights panel with per-node statistics

teacher-planner.name: Teacher Planner
teacher-planner.tagline: Curriculum planning with linked lesson plans, term schedules, and school collaboration.
teacher-planner.description: A full-stack planning tool that replaces Excel and Word for design & technology educators. Create three linked document types — Curriculum Overviews, Term Schedules, and Lesson Plans — with 50+ composable section templates (Bloom's taxonomy, WALT, UN SDGs, and more). Supports rich text editing via Tiptap, server-side print routes for A4 landscape PDFs, bilingual UI (English/Thai), and role-based school collaboration.
highlights: Three-tier linked documents: Curriculum → Schedule → Lesson
50+ composable section templates with custom profiles
Rich text editor (Tiptap) with server-side PDF export
Role-based school collaboration with shared documents

styles-eliminator.name: Styles Eliminator
styles-eliminator.tagline: Chrome extension that detects unused and overridden CSS from DevTools.
styles-eliminator.description: A Manifest V3 Chrome extension that integrates with DevTools to find unused CSS rules. It scans the Styles panel for crossed-out declarations, categorizes them by selector and property, and exports structured reports in JSON for build tool integration. Real-time MutationObserver tracking monitors style changes as you interact with the page.
highlights: DevTools panel integration for live CSS scanning
Three views: all selectors, unused selectors, unused properties
JSON export for build tool and CI integration
Real-time monitoring via MutationObserver

vectme.name: VectMe
vectme.tagline: GPU-accelerated image-to-vector converter — exploring WebGL, Potrace, and Electron.
vectme.description: A learning project exploring GPU-accelerated image processing in Electron. Built to understand WebGL shader pipelines for edge detection and color quantization, Potrace integration for raster-to-vector conversion, and Web Worker threading for non-blocking batch operations. The app converts images to SVG, PDF, and EPS with interactive cropping and background removal. Currently non-functional but demonstrates deep exploration of graphics programming and cross-platform desktop builds.
highlights: WebGL shaders for GPU-accelerated image processing
Batch processing with Web Workers (non-blocking UI)
Interactive cropping with background removal
Export to SVG, PDF, and EPS with cross-platform builds

live-translate-scroll.name: Live Translate Scroll
live-translate-scroll.tagline: Real-time screen text capture and overlay translation — exploring native mobile APIs.
live-translate-scroll.description: A learning project exploring native screen capture and OCR on both Android and iOS. Uses MediaProjection + ML Kit on Android and Screen Recording + UIKit on iOS to capture text from any app, run OCR, and overlay translations in real-time with a floating control panel. Built to understand platform-specific APIs for screen capture, text recognition pipelines, and cross-platform mobile architecture.
highlights: Android MediaProjection API for live screen capture
ML Kit Text Recognition for real-time OCR
iOS screen recording with UIKit overlay
Floating control panel with language switching

mining-visualizer.name: Mining Visualizer
mining-visualizer.tagline: Real-time crypto mining dashboard — exploring Chart.js, polling APIs, and data visualization.
mining-visualizer.description: A learning project exploring real-time data visualization with Chart.js. Polls local mining software (T-Rex, SRB-Multi) and renders 8 interactive metrics — hashrate, power, temperature, fan speed, efficiency, shares/minute, accepted shares, and watchdog restarts — with zoom, pan, and session tracking. Built to understand charting libraries, real-time data pipelines, and interactive canvas-based UIs.
highlights: 8 real-time metrics with interactive Chart.js graphs
Zoom, pan, and tooltips on all charts
Multi-miner support (T-Rex, SRB-Multi)
Session tracking with data polling

portfolio-admin.name: devPortfolio Admin
portfolio-admin.tagline: Desktop control panel for managing your portfolio site
portfolio-admin.description: An Electron desktop app that serves as a full admin panel for a developer portfolio site. Edit projects, manage pinned showcases,   customize themes with live preview, handle screenshots, and commit/push changes to Git - all from a single native interface.
highlights: Full CRUD for projects with AI-assisted metadata generation
Built-in Git panel with status, diff preview, commit & push
Dual theme editor with presets for both portfolio and admin UI
Project folder scanner that auto-detects tech stack from source files
